spec.name: zlib_compress_file
spec.description: Read a file, compress its bytes with zlib, write lowercase hex to another file

input_path.description: Path to the file to compress

output_path.description: Path to write the hex-encoded compressed bytes

spec.implementation_notes: Use Python zlib.compress on the file's bytes, then hex encode (lowercase) and write

request.rationale: No existing tool compresses data with zlib; this tool directly fulfills objective 1.
